purpose: FLAGSHIP B5: GPU-driven zero-copy gather. B2-B4 fully characterized prefetch: the predictor is right (92.6-93.1% pre/post-attention router agreement), the bytes are nearly free (2-A = 1.07x), and every CPU-mediated way of ISSUING the copies loses - B3 paid ~94 added GPU->CPU syncs/token (0.87-1.07x), B4 paid GIL contention (0.57x). B5 is the identified endgame shape: the copy IS a kernel (kernel/host_gather.py) reading the pinned host expert store directly over UVA (zero-copy PCIe), indexed by GPU-RESIDENT router ids. No CPU ever knows the ids; the token loop enqueues bounded work and never synchronizes. Two ON modes adjudicated against the same OFF baseline: 'gpu' = true post-attention ids, gather serialized on the main stream (removes the baseline's ~94 router syncs/token AND its 32-small-memcpy/layer pattern, no speculation); 'gpu_early' = pre-attention early-router ids gathered speculatively on a prefetch stream overlapping attention, then a post-attention correction gather that skips matched slots (only mispredictions re-fetch).
frozen_commit: 3305a83 (kernel + harness modes committed at freeze; this file committed alongside).

protocol.host: RunPod SECURE H100 (NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3), >=600 GB network volume at /workspace; on-box 1GiBx10 pinned H2D microbench defines the waterfall ceiling.
protocol.runs: SMOKE first (--layers 4, --prefetch-mode gpu,gpu_early, 8 tokens): validates the triton int64->pointer bitcast primitive and both mode loops in minutes, gating the ~17-min full build. Then full 94-layer: per prompt (3 fixed prompts), OFF (64 greedy tokens) then GPU (128) then GPU_EARLY (128), all in ONE process against the same build; model state reset between generations.
protocol.reduction: median s/token per mode per prompt; positional hit rate for gpu_early from the GPU counter.

declared_risks_and_accounting.primitive: tl.cast(int64 -> tl.pointer_type) reading cudaHostAlloc'd memory from device code is not previously exercised in this program; the smoke run gates on it. If the smoke fails on the primitive the arc ABORTS and is reported as such (no silent retry with a different design).
declared_risks_and_accounting.uva_bandwidth: SM-issued UVA reads over PCIe may not saturate the link the way the DMA copy engines do. In 'gpu' mode the gather is on the critical path, so a substrate bandwidth deficit would show as a paired LOSS there even though the sync-removal idea is sound. The gpu vs gpu_early vs baseline triangle is the declared attribution instrument; a substrate deficit is reported as the finding, not tuned around.
declared_risks_and_accounting.hit_accounting: ids are SORTED and matching is POSITIONAL: a single substituted expert can shift sorted alignment, so the measured hit_rate LOWER-BOUNDS top-8 set intersection. The correction gather skips slots by the same positional test, so hit_rate EQUALS the fraction of PCIe row-traffic actually avoided - the number reported is exactly the number that matters.
declared_risks_and_accounting.confound: 'gpu' changes both the sync structure AND the copy substrate (memcpyAsync -> gather kernel) relative to OFF; it is not a pure sync ablation. Interpretation uses all three arms.

frozen_verdict_criteria.G1_identity: GPU and GPU_EARLY greedy tokens each identical to OFF for the paired prefix, all 3 prompts (6/6 checks).
frozen_verdict_criteria.G2_gpu: median tok/s(GPU) >= 1.05 x tok/s(OFF) on every prompt.
frozen_verdict_criteria.G3_gpu_early: median tok/s(GPU_EARLY) >= 1.15 x tok/s(OFF) on every prompt AND >= 0.80 x the on-box waterfall ceiling on every prompt.
frozen_verdict_criteria.REPORT: positional hit rate; absolute tok/s all arms; link GB/s + waterfall; off-baseline vs the 4.30-4.36 four-pod replication band; texts + distinct-2.
frozen_verdict_criteria.no_tune_clause: Failures reported at full volume; claims narrowed; no re-runs until green.
